name: rolemanager
author: Taako
description: A combined role management cog inspired by RoleUtils and RoleTools, with self roles, external role-change rules, policy enforcement, reaction roles, button roles, select-menu roles, autoroles, sticky roles, temporary roles, bulk role operations, migration helpers, and full Red-Web-Dashboard support.
install_msg: rolemanager loaded. Use `[p]rolemanager` or `[p]rm` for setup, `[p]rm selfrole <role>` for member self roles, `[p]rm rule` for automatic role-change rules, and the Red-Web-Dashboard page for visual configuration and operations.
short: Complete role management with automatic rules, self roles, policies, role panels, autoroles, sticky/temp roles, dashboard operations, and bulk tools.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild role configuration, role-policy and role-change-rule settings, role costs, button/select/reaction-role component settings, message IDs, channel IDs, role IDs, emoji keys, temporary-role expiry timestamps, and Discord user IDs for sticky and temporary role assignment. It does not store message content except optional component panel text sent directly to Discord.
